name: Parineeta
overview: A chance meeting at a train station after years apart reignites old emotions between Lalita and Shekhar, sparking a tumultuous journey of love, jealousy, and complex bonds. Based on the timeless novel by Sarat Chandra Chattopadhyay, Parineeta, streaming from 15 August, only on hoichoi.

trailers.title: Official Trailer - Parineeta (পরিণীতা) | Debchandrima, Gaurav | Aditi Roy | Stream Now | hoichoi
